description: Seth Kybird is interim Chief Executive Officer at Nuclear Waste Services (NWS). Before joining NWS in April 2025, Seth was CEO at Nuclear Transport Solutions (NTS) since its formation in 2021, and previously Managing Director of International Nuclear Services (INS). He is also a former strategy consultant and chartered accountant. Having previously worked at NDA, KPMG, and Deloitte, Seth has experience of leading and developing organisations, and a strong track record in tackling complex commercial challenges in the UK and internationally.

details.body:
Seth Kybird is interim Chief Executive Officer at Nuclear Waste Services (NWS). Before joining NWS in April 2025, Seth was CEO at Nuclear Transport Solutions (NTS) since its formation in 2021, and previously Managing Director of International Nuclear Services (INS).

He is also a former strategy consultant and chartered accountant. Having previously worked at NDA, KPMG, and Deloitte, Seth has experience of leading and developing organisations, and a strong track record in tackling complex commercial challenges in the UK and internationally.

title: Seth Kybird
